title: myosotis exarrhena
intro: Myosotis exarrhena, also known as Alpine Forget-me-not or Yellow Alpine Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Myosotis exarrhena include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Myosotis exarrhena can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
